questions.question: Should saved searches be per-user or shareable across a team?
questions.why: Drives the data model and authz — blocks the LLD.

questions.question: How many saved searches may a user keep?
questions.why: Sets a storage bound and whether we need pagination.

questions.question: What retention applies to a deleted saved search?
questions.why: Affects the data-lifecycle section and any soft-delete window.

questions.question: Do we localize saved-search names at launch?
questions.why: Non-blocking for the HLD; can be settled in the LLD.
